page.title: Admissions
page.description: Manage active stays, room assignments, and discharge flow.

form.title: Admit patient
form.description: Create a new admission using the current room capacity.
form.patientSearchPlaceholder: Search patients by name or phone
form.admissionDateHint: Leave blank to use the current date.

list.title: Admissions list
list.description: Review admitted patients and discharge status.

states.loadingOptionsDescription: Please wait while patients and rooms are loaded.
states.emptyDescription: Create an admission to get started.
states.emptyFilteredDescription: Try another filter or clear the filter.
states.emptyPatientsDescription: Create a patient before starting an admission.
states.emptyRoomsDescription: Create a room before starting an admission.
states.noCapacityDescription: Rooms with no capacity or under maintenance cannot be selected.
states.unauthorizedDescription: Your session is not authorized for this request.
states.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to access this resource.
states.errorDescription: We could not load admission data.

errors.list: We could not load the admissions list.
errors.save: We could not save the admission.
errors.discharge: We could not discharge this patient.
errors.patients: We could not load the patients for this screen.
errors.rooms: We could not load the rooms for this screen.
errors.active: We could not load the active admissions.

widget.title: Admitted patients
widget.description: Patients currently assigned to active admissions.
widget.emptyDescription: There are no active admissions right now.
